category_sources: source_facts.description: Directly include C headers in D source code.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; README is the primary official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/atilaneves/dpp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies including C headers in D source code; source_facts.executables lists d++.
